headline: Gap Q4 Earnings & Sales Meet Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: GAP's Q4 results are in line with estimates. Revenues rise 2% Y/Y, powered by Old Navy, Gap and Banana Republic comps growth despite margin pressure.

raw.headline: Gap Q4 Earnings & Sales Meet Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
raw.summary: GAP's Q4 results are in line with estimates. Revenues rise 2% Y/Y, powered by Old Navy, Gap and Banana Republic comps growth despite margin pressure.

headline: GREENROW OPENS FIRST RETAIL STORE IN NEW YORK’S SOHO NEIGHBORHOOD
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 06, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc.'s GreenRow brand opens first store in NYC's SoHo Neighborhood

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Williams-Sonoma, Raises Price Target to $208
summary: Citigroup  analyst Steven Zaccone   maintains Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $188 to $208.
